name: Irem
summary: The City of Pillars, dreaming hidden and untouched amid the pathless deserts of Arabia, where old Castro placed the center of the cult.
description:
Irem, the City of Pillars, dreams hidden and untouched amid the pathless deserts of Arabia.

It owes its place in the record to Castro's confession: asked of the cult, he said he thought its center lay in those deserts where Irem dreams.

sources.quote: Of the cult, he said that he thought the center lay amid the pathless deserts of Arabia, where Irem, the City of Pillars, dreams hidden and untouched.
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
